'''鈭歸-ch-p''' ('''wachapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ponce|ponce]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ponce|ponce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-ch-p
|-
! Lemma
| wachapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wachapithi|wachapithi]] || [[word:wachapiji|wachapiji]] || [[word:wachapishi|wachapishi]] || [[word:wachapi|wachapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wachaputhuth|wachaputhuth]] || [[word:wachapujuj|wachapujuj]] || [[word:wachapushush|wachapushush]] || [[word:wachap|wachap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wachaputhu|wachaputhu]] || [[word:wachapuju|wachapuju]] || [[word:wachapushu|wachapushu]] || [[word:wachapu|wachapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wachapufuth|wachapufuth]] || [[word:wachapufuj|wachapufuj]] || [[word:wachapufush|wachapufush]] || [[word:wachapuf|wachapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wachapethe|wachapethe]] || [[word:wachapeje|wachapeje]] || [[word:wachapeshe|wachapeshe]] || [[word:wachape|wachape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wachapothoth|wachapothoth]] || [[word:wachapojoj|wachapojoj]] || [[word:wachaposhosh|wachaposhosh]] || [[word:wachap|wachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wachapotho|wachapotho]] || [[word:wachapojo|wachapojo]] || [[word:wachaposho|wachaposho]] || [[word:wachapo|wachapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wachapofoth|wachapofoth]] || [[word:wachapofoj|wachapofoj]] || [[word:wachapofosh|wachapofosh]] || [[word:wachapof|wachapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wachap忙th忙|wachap忙th忙]] || [[word:wachap忙j忙|wachap忙j忙]] || [[word:wachap忙sh忙|wachap忙sh忙]] || [[word:wachap忙|wachap忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wachapathath|wachapathath]] || [[word:wachapajaj|wachapajaj]] || [[word:wachapashash|wachapashash]] || [[word:wachap|wachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wachapatha|wachapatha]] || [[word:wachapaja|wachapaja]] || [[word:wachapasha|wachapasha]] || [[word:wachapa|wachapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wachapafath|wachapafath]] || [[word:wachapafaj|wachapafaj]] || [[word:wachapafash|wachapafash]] || [[word:wachapaf|wachapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:wachapasha|wachapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowachapasha|gowachapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwachapasha|gokiwachapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wachapn眉sha|wachapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowachapnkn眉sha|gowachapnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwachapn眉sha|gokiwachapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wachapsh毛sha|wachapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowachapnksh毛sha|gowachapnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwachapsh毛sha|gokiwachapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wachaprosha|wachaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowachapnkrosha|gowachapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwachaprosha|gokiwachaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wachapmusha|wachapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowachapnkmusha|gowachapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwachapmusha|gokiwachapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wachapsherasha|wachapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowachapnksherasha|gowachapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwachapsherasha|gokiwachapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:wachapngasha|wachapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowachapnkngasha|gowachapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwachapngasha|gokiwachapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wachapyasha|wachapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowachapnkyasha|gowachapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwachapyasha|gokiwachapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:wachapyamasha|wachapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowachapnkyamasha|gowachapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwachapyamasha|gokiwachapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wachapn眉sh毛sha|wachapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowachapnkn眉sh毛sha|gowachapnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwachapn眉sh毛sha|gokiwachapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wachapn眉rosha|wachapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowachapnkn眉rosha|gowachapnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwachapn眉rosha|gokiwachapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wachapn眉musha|wachapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowachapnkn眉musha|gowachapnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwachapn眉musha|gokiwachapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:wachapsh毛n眉sha|wachapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowachapnksh毛n眉sha|gowachapnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwachapsh毛n眉sha|gokiwachapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wachapsh毛rosha|wachapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowachapnksh毛rosha|gowachapnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwachapsh毛rosha|gokiwachapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wachapsh毛musha|wachapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowachapnksh毛musha|gowachapnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwachapsh毛musha|gokiwachapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:wachapron眉sha|wachapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowachapnkron眉sha|gowachapnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwachapron眉sha|gokiwachapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:wachaprosh毛sha|wachaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowachapnkrosh毛sha|gowachapnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwachaprosh毛sha|gokiwachaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wachapromusha|wachapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowachapnkromusha|gowachapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwachapromusha|gokiwachapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:wachapmun眉sha|wachapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowachapnkmun眉sha|gowachapnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwachapmun眉sha|gokiwachapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:wachapmush毛sha|wachapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowachapnkmush毛sha|gowachapnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwachapmush毛sha|gokiwachapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wachapmurosha|wachapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowachapnkmurosha|gowachapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwachapmurosha|gokiwachapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:wachap|wachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:w忙ch忙p|w忙ch忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howachap|howachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:how忙ch忙p|how忙ch忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowachap|hohowachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohow忙ch忙p|hohow忙ch忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉wachap|n眉wachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉w忙ch忙p|n眉w忙ch忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉wachap|n眉n眉wachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉w忙ch忙p|n眉n眉w忙ch忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂wachap|n茂wachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂w忙ch忙p|n茂w忙ch忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂wachap|n茂n茂wachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂w忙ch忙p|n茂n茂w忙ch忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwachap|luwachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luw忙ch忙p|luw忙ch忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwachap|luluwachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluw忙ch忙p|luluw忙ch忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwachap|liwachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liw忙ch忙p|liw忙ch忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwachap|liliwachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliw忙ch忙p|liliw忙ch忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowachap|kowachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kow忙ch忙p|kow忙ch忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowachap|kokowachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokow忙ch忙p|kokow忙ch忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewachap|kewachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kew忙ch忙p|kew忙ch忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewachap|kekewachap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekew忙ch忙p|kekew忙ch忙p]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
